name: Taurus, The Brute

sheet.name: Taurus, The Brute
sheet.background_story:
Taurus, known as "The Brute," is a powerful berserker from the outskirts of Mount Turlo. He's a fearsome fighter with incredible strength, but his rage can sometimes make him lose control. Despite this, he's fiercely loyal to his allies and will do whatever it takes to protect them.

He has been in a relationship with Elizabeth Corporus for a very long time.
